name: How Not to Live Your Life
original_name: How Not to Live Your Life
overview: Sitcom about 20-something Don, a man with bad luck and even worse instincts. Don's overactive imagination is always in full flow in the form of quick-fire fantasy sequences as he imagines what he would really like to say.

trailers.title: Things you shouldn't say after a one night stand - How Not To Live Your Life - BBC Three
Things you hope your neighbour doesn't say - How Not To Live Your Life - BBC Three
